title: Fox Hime Zero
notes: Works perfectly, but you need to install corefonts in game's wineprefix. Easiest way is to install https://github.com/Sirmentio/protontricks and then run $ protontricks 844930 corefonts
The latest Proton update pushes this game to Platinum :)
title: Fox Hime Zero

notes: Note: Nvidia drivers 415 completely break unity games and will cause crash on start. drivers 410 however are perfectly fine :)
